expectations.text: Runs the bundled checker in audit mode against globals.css
expectations.evidence: This run actually executed `check_contrast.py audit packages/ui/src/styles/globals.css` (the one run where Bash worked).

expectations.text: Reports results for BOTH light and dark themes
expectations.evidence: Reported per-pair ratios for light and noted dark passing values.

expectations.text: Cites the correct AA thresholds (4.5:1 text, 3:1 large/non-text)
Flags at least the genuine failures (e.g. muted-foreground light, sidebar-primary-foreground)
expectations.evidence: Flagged input/bg, muted-foreground/muted, ring, sidebar-ring; noted sidebar-primary-foreground fails but tokens are dead.

expectations.text: Applies interpretation rather than blindly listing every fail
expectations.evidence: Decorative-border exemption, large-text caveat, dead-token detection, 1.4.1 color-alone for status tokens.

expectations.text: Does not edit any token values (audit was read-only request)

notes: GAP: relied on the checker's pair list, so it did NOT surface that warning/success/info FAIL AA as text on white in light mode (3.19/3.30/3.60) — the script never audits status colors (no -foreground partner). The unaided baseline caught this by reasoning.
